headline: Mining study confirms 13x edge on top-3 movers (26.8% vs 2.0% random); dashboard live and calibrated; three hypotheses below constitutional floor.
what_happened: TICK-036 miner found unfitted 20-name watchlist catches ≥1 of day's top-3 movers on 26.8% of days vs 2.0% baseline over 492 days; ex-ante tell is IDENTITY (runner within 5d), not price drift.
Dashboard rebuild shipped overnight: Sharpe corrected to 1.25, ICARUS shadow days merged into calendar, skills panel added, Oracle daily brief live and verified.
HYP-097 refuted operator's 30% thesis on low-cap collar physics; constitutional yield fell to 0.0166%/day vs 0.023% floor; remaining honest paths are distribution-based sizing and edge concentration.
what_it_means: The miner surface is real and 13x stronger than noise, but you need news pass + fitted-score to move it to live signals (HYP-099 next). Dashboard and metrics are now honest. Three yield-frontier hypotheses all landed below floor or invalid—you're 1/30 shadow days in ICARUS; the gapper edge is real but thin, and low-cap collar assumptions don't hold. Focus shifts to concentration and measured variance premium.
todays_one_thing: Preregister HYP-099 (news pass + fitted TICK-036 score on mining watchlist) as the next live test; it's the only path from the miner's 13x edge to tradeable signals.
